package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
)

// scenario for grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc: interceptor/middleware construction inside RPC handler methods instead of at server setup
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario414Positive(ctx context.Context, addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	_ = context.Background()
	return grpc.Dial(addr)
}
